Sandwiches & Burgers · Lunch
Classic BLT
Toasted sourdough roll filled with crispy bacon, fresh lettuce, ripe tomato and creamy aioli
FJD$32
Price
1×
Portions
5 min
Prep
6 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Bread
Sourdough rolleach1
Protein
Bacon rashers, crispyg60
Filling
Iceberg lettuceg30
Tomato, slicedg60
Sauce
Creamy aiolig30
Method
1
Render bacon in pan until crisp. Drain on paper.
2
Toast sourdough roll cut-side down on grill or flat-top.
3
Spread aioli generously on both inner faces.
4
Layer lettuce, tomato, and crispy bacon.
5
Close roll. Plate with fries.
Plating Notes
Serve closed. Bacon visible at sides. Fries alongside.
Equipment
Flat-top grill · Bread knife
